narratives.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला, नाटो की धमकी के बाद पुतिन ने दे दी चेतावनी
narratives.reasoning: The text evokes fear or anxiety about potential threats, dangers or reactions by mentioning a possible nuclear attack on America and Britain.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला, नाटो की धमकी के बाद पुतिन ने दे दी चेतावनी
subnarratives.reasoning: The text explicitly mentions the possibility of a nuclear attack by Russia on America and Britain, which aligns with the subnarrative of evoking fear or anxiety about the use of nuclear weapons.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: Russia will also attack other countries
subnarratives.evidence_quote: उन्होंने कहा कि अगर ये देश यूक्रेन को रूस पर हमला करने देंगे तो वे उन देशों पर हमला कर देंगे
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly supports the subnarrative that Russia will attack other countries, as it mentions that if certain conditions are met, Russia will attack those countries.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: NATO should/will directly intervene
subnarratives.evidence_quote: नाटो के धमकी के बाद पुतिन का हमला
subnarratives.reasoning: The mention of NATO's threat and Putin's subsequent warning implies that NATO's actions could lead to direct intervention, fitting the subnarrative of suggesting or claiming NATO ought to or will take direct military action.
